tool.name: DFT calculations with Quantum ESPRESSO
tool.title: nanoMaterials Simulation Toolkit - Quantum Espresso DFT calculations
tool.about: Use the four panels on the left to set up the simulation. -Input model: specify the initial atomic model. -Energy expression: level of theory, approximations and numerical accuracy. -Phonons: specify phonon calculations -Band Structure/DOS: specify band structure and DoS calculations -Advanced Options: select serial or parallel as the simulation venue -- Then, push Simulate button. -- The simulation results will appear here.

about.label: Create the model
about.description: Please use one of the premade files or create your own.

about.label: Premade atomistic structure
about.description: Loads pre made files into Atomic Positions and Lattice Vectors

about.label: Atomic Coordinates
about.description: Determines whether atomic positions are given in fractional (cell) or Cartesian coordinates.

about.label: Structure type
about.description: Select a structure to be used for the unit cell

about.label: Determine unitcell (free)
about.description: Select your own lattice vectors

about.label: Title of Run
about.description: The title here will be placed in the input file to the Quantum Espresso code

about.label: Atomic Structure
about.description: The first line is number of atoms, the second a comment, and then n lines with the element symbol and the position vector (in Angstroms for cartensian coordinates). Atom positions sperated by a space or a tab.

about.label: Cell Vectors (A)
about.description: Enter 3 by 3 matrix for the lattice parameters in units of Angstroms. Seperated by a space of a tab.

about.label: Lattice Parameter "a" (A)
about.description: Enter the lattice parameter a in units of Angstroms

about.label: Ratio Lattice Parameters "b/a"
about.description: Enter the ratio between lattice parameters b and a in units of Angstroms

about.label: Ratio Lattice Parameters "c/a"
about.description: Enter the ratio between lattice parameters c and a in units of Angstroms

about.label: Energy Expression
about.description: Determines the method to describe the total energy of the system and derived quantities like force and stress.

about.label: Exchange and Correlation functional
about.description: Determines the exchange-correlation functional approximation

about.label: Relax
about.description: Determines whether to relax system

about.label: Ionic Dynamics
about.description: Select ionic dynamics

about.label: Cell Dynamics
about.description: Select cell dynamics

about.label: Parrinello-Rahman
about.description: damped (Beeman) dynamics of the Parrinello-Rahman extended lagrangian

about.label: Wentzcovitch
about.description: damped (Beeman) dynamics of the new Wentzcovitch extended lagrangian

about.label: BFGS quasi-newton
about.description: ion dynamics must be 'BFGS quasi-newton' too

about.label: K-grid spacing (Reciprocal-space)
about.description: Provides the number of k points to use periodically.

about.label: X direction
about.description: Specifies the number of k points in reciprocal-space x direction

about.label: Y direction
about.description: Specifies the number of k points in reciprocal-space y direction

about.label: Z direction
about.description: Specifies the number of k points in reciprocal-space z direction

about.label: Number of bands
about.description: Number of Bands

about.label: Wavefunction Kinetic Energy cutoff (Ry)
about.description: kinetic energy cutoff (Ry) for wavefunctions

about.label: Charge Density Kinetic Energy cutoff (Ry)
about.description: kinetic energy cutoff (Ry) for charge density and potential

about.label: SCF Convergence Criterion (Ry)
about.description: Self consistent field convergence criterion

about.label: SCF maximum steps
about.description: Maximum number of Self consistent field steps

about.label: Enable occupation options
about.description: Enable occupation options

about.label: Occupation
about.description: Select smearing for gaussian smearing for metal, tetrahedra for metals and DOS calculations or fixed for insulators with a gap

about.label: Smearing
about.description: Select a smearing option

about.label: Gaussian Spreading (Ry)
about.description: Value of the Gaussian spreading

about.label: Enable mixing options
about.description: Enable mixing options

about.label: plain
about.description: charge density Broyden mixing

about.label: TF
about.description: simple Thomas-Fermi screening

about.label: local-TF
about.description: local-density-dependent Thomas Fermi screening

about.label: Mixing factor
about.description: mixing factor for self-consistency

about.label: Phonons
about.description: Determines options for phonon calculations.

about.label: Phonon Calculations
about.description: Do you want to do phonon calculations?

about.label: Atomic Mass
about.description: Enter element symbol and the element's atomic mass seperated by a space or tab. Enter each element on a different line

about.label: Phonon Convergence Criterion (Ry)
about.description: Phonon energy convergence criterion

about.label: Dielectric Constant
about.description: Calculate Macroscopic Dielectric Constant?

about.label: q-point
about.description: Point at which to do phonon calculations

about.label: Q-grid spacing (Reciprocal-space)
about.description: Provides the number of q points to use periodically.

about.label: X direction
about.description: Specifies the number of q points in reciprocal-space x direction

about.label: Y direction
about.description: Specifies the number of q points in reciprocal-space y direction

about.label: Z direction
about.description: Specifies the number of q points in reciprocal-space z direction

about.label: Dispersion Curve path
about.description: List of high symmetry points describing path

about.label: Number of Points
about.description: Number of Points to display on Dispersion relationship plot

about.label: Band Structure Calculations
about.description: Do you want to do band structure calculations?

about.label: Band Structure
about.description: Provide parameters describing band structure

about.label: Path
about.description: List of high symmetry points describing path

about.label: Number of Points
about.description: Number of Points to display on Band Structure plot

about.label: Density of States Calculations
about.description: Do you want to do DoS calculations?

about.label: minimum Energy (eV)
about.description: minimum energy for DOS plot

about.label: maximum Energy (eV)
about.description: maximum energy for DOS plot

about.label: energy grid step (eV)
about.description: energy increments on DOS plot

about.label: Simulation venue
about.description: Run in serial on local nanoHUB resources or in parallel on Purdue resources

about.label: Number of nodes
about.description: Set the number of nodes used in the parallel simulation

about.label: Walltime
about.description: Enter the requested simulation time in hh:mm:ss

about.label: Density of States
about.description: Electron Density of States

about.label: Fermi level
about.description: Fermi level

about.label: Band 1
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 2
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 3
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 4
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 5
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 6
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 7
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: Band 8
about.description: Electron Band Structure

about.label: High Symmetry Point 0.5 0.5 0.5
about.description: High Symmetry Point 0.5 0.5 0.5

about.label: High Symmetry Point 0.0 0.0 0.0
about.description: High Symmetry Point 0.0 0.0 0.0

about.label: High Symmetry Point 1.0 0.0 0.0
about.description: High Symmetry Point 1.0 0.0 0.0

about.label: Fermi level: 6.4805
about.description: Fermi level: 6.4805

about.label: SCF Output Log
about.description: Output generated by Self-consisting field calculation

string.current:
Program PWSCF v.4.1.1 starts ... Today is 22Feb2026 at 14:50:30
Parallel version (MPI)
Number of processors in use: 1
For Norm-Conserving or Ultrasoft (Vanderbilt) Pseudopotentials or PAW
Current dimensions of program pwscf are: Max number of different atomic species (ntypx) = 10 Max number of k-points (npk) = 40000 Max angular momentum in pseudopotentials (lmaxx) = 3 Waiting for input...
Subspace diagonalization in iterative solution of the eigenvalue problem: Too few procs for parallel algorithm we need at least 4 procs per pool a serial algorithm will be used
Planes per process (thick) : nr3 = 24 npp = 24 ncplane = 576 Planes per process (smooth): nr3s= 20 npps= 20 ncplanes= 400
Proc/ planes cols G planes cols G columns G Pool (dense grid) (smooth grid) (wavefct grid) 1 24 349 4285 20 235 2277 85 531
Title: Silicon band structure
bravais-lattice index = 2 lattice parameter (a_0) = 10.2612 a.u. unit-cell volume = 270.1071 (a.u.)^3 number of atoms/cell = 2 number of atomic types = 1 number of electrons = 8.00 number of Kohn-Sham states= 8 kinetic-energy cutoff = 16.0000 Ry charge density cutoff = 96.0000 Ry convergence threshold = 1.0E-06 mixing beta = 0.7000 number of iterations used = 8 plain mixing Exchange-correlation = SLA PZ NOGX NOGC (1100)
celldm(1)= 10.261212 celldm(2)= 0.000000 celldm(3)= 0.000000 celldm(4)= 0.000000 celldm(5)= 0.000000 celldm(6)= 0.000000
crystal axes: (cart. coord. in units of a_0) a(1) = ( -0.500000 0.000000 0.500000 ) a(2) = ( 0.000000 0.500000 0.500000 ) a(3) = ( -0.500000 0.500000 0.000000 )
reciprocal axes: (cart. coord. in units 2 pi/a_0) b(1) = ( -1.000000 -1.000000 1.000000 ) b(2) = ( 1.000000 1.000000 1.000000 ) b(3) = ( -1.000000 1.000000 -1.000000 )
PseudoPot. # 1 for Si read from file Si.UPF Pseudo is Norm-conserving, Zval = 4.0 Generated by new atomic code, or converted to UPF format Using radial grid of 431 points, 2 beta functions with: l(1) = 0 l(2) = 1
atomic species valence mass pseudopotential Si 4.00 28.08600 Si( 1.00)
48 Sym.Ops. (with inversion)
Cartesian axes
site n. atom positions (a_0 units) 1 Si tau( 1) = ( 0.0000000 0.0000000 0.0000000 ) 2 Si tau( 2) = ( -0.2500000 0.2500000 0.2500000 )
number of k points= 29 (tetrahedron method) cart. coord. in units 2pi/a_0 k( 1) = ( 0.0000000 0.0000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0039062 k( 2) = ( -0.1250000 0.1250000 -0.1250000), wk = 0.0312500 k( 3) = ( -0.2500000 0.2500000 -0.2500000), wk = 0.0312500 k( 4) = ( -0.3750000 0.3750000 -0.3750000), wk = 0.0312500 k( 5) = ( 0.5000000 -0.5000000 0.5000000), wk = 0.0156250 k( 6) = ( 0.0000000 0.2500000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0234375 k( 7) = ( -0.1250000 0.3750000 -0.1250000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 8) = ( -0.2500000 0.5000000 -0.2500000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 9) = ( 0.6250000 -0.3750000 0.6250000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 10) = ( 0.5000000 -0.2500000 0.5000000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 11) = ( 0.3750000 -0.1250000 0.3750000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 12) = ( 0.2500000 0.0000000 0.2500000), wk = 0.0468750 k( 13) = ( 0.0000000 0.5000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0234375 k( 14) = ( -0.1250000 0.6250000 -0.1250000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 15) = ( 0.7500000 -0.2500000 0.7500000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 16) = ( 0.6250000 -0.1250000 0.6250000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 17) = ( 0.5000000 0.0000000 0.5000000), wk = 0.0468750 k( 18) = ( 0.0000000 0.7500000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0234375 k( 19) = ( 0.8750000 -0.1250000 0.8750000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 20) = ( 0.7500000 0.0000000 0.7500000), wk = 0.0468750 k( 21) = ( 0.0000000 -1.0000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0117188 k( 22) = ( -0.2500000 0.5000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 23) = ( 0.6250000 -0.3750000 0.8750000), wk = 0.1875000 k( 24) = ( 0.5000000 -0.2500000 0.7500000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 25) = ( 0.7500000 -0.2500000 1.0000000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 26) = ( 0.6250000 -0.1250000 0.8750000), wk = 0.1875000 k( 27) = ( 0.5000000 0.0000000 0.7500000), wk = 0.0937500 k( 28) = ( -0.2500000 -1.0000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0468750 k( 29) = ( -0.5000000 -1.0000000 0.0000000), wk = 0.0234375
G cutoff = 256.0406 ( 4285 G-vectors) FFT grid: ( 24, 24, 24) G cutoff = 170.6937 ( 2277 G-vectors) smooth grid: ( 20, 20, 20)
Largest allocated arrays est. size (Mb) dimensions Kohn-Sham Wavefunctions 0.04 Mb ( 303, 8) NL pseudopotentials 0.04 Mb ( 303, 8) Each V/rho on FFT grid 0.21 Mb ( 13824) Each G-vector array 0.03 Mb ( 4285) G-vector shells 0.00 Mb ( 87) Largest temporary arrays est. size (Mb) dimensions Auxiliary wavefunctions 0.15 Mb ( 303, 32) Each subspace H/S matrix 0.02 Mb ( 32, 32) Each <psi_i|beta_j> matrix 0.00 Mb ( 8, 8) Arrays for rho mixing 1.69 Mb ( 13824, 8)
Initial potential from superposition of free atoms
starting charge 7.99901, renormalised to 8.00000 Starting wfc are 8 atomic wfcs
total cpu time spent up to now is 0.05 secs
per-process dynamical memory: 7.1 Mb
Self-consistent Calculation
iteration # 1 ecut= 16.00 Ry beta=0.70 Davidson diagonalization with overlap ethr = 1.00E-02, avg # of iterations = 3.6
Threshold (ethr) on eigenvalues was too large: Diagonalizing with lowered threshold
Davidson diagonalization with overlap ethr = 7.59E-04, avg # of iterations = 1.0
total cpu time spent up to now is 0.23 secs
total energy = -15.83534820 Ry Harris-Foulkes estimate = -15.85565594 Ry estimated scf accuracy < 0.06010488 Ry
iteration # 2 ecut= 16.00 Ry beta=0.70 Davidson diagonalization with overlap ethr = 7.51E-04, avg # of iterations = 1.0
total cpu time spent up to now is 0.29 secs
total energy = -15.83883689 Ry Harris-Foulkes estimate = -15.83906976 Ry estimated scf accuracy < 0.00183237 Ry
iteration # 3 ecut= 16.00 Ry beta=0.70 Davidson diagonalization with overlap ethr = 2.29E-05, avg # of iterations = 2.3
total cpu time spent up to now is 0.37 secs
total energy = -15.83892741 Ry Harris-Foulkes estimate = -15.83893265 Ry estimated scf accuracy < 0.00005070 Ry
iteration # 4 ecut= 16.00 Ry beta=0.70 Davidson diagonalization with overlap ethr = 6.34E-07, avg # of iterations = 2.1
total cpu time spent up to now is 0.45 secs
End of self-consistent calculation

Writing output data file qe.save

init_run : 0.03s CPU electrons : 0.40s CPU forces : 0.00s CPU stress : 0.01s CPU
Called by init_run: wfcinit : 0.02s CPU potinit : 0.00s CPU
Called by electrons: c_bands : 0.30s CPU ( 5 calls, 0.061 s avg) sum_band : 0.09s CPU ( 5 calls, 0.018 s avg) v_of_rho : 0.00s CPU ( 5 calls, 0.000 s avg) mix_rho : 0.00s CPU ( 5 calls, 0.000 s avg)

Called by *egterg: h_psi : 0.26s CPU ( 465 calls, 0.001 s avg) g_psi : 0.00s CPU ( 291 calls, 0.000 s avg) cdiaghg : 0.03s CPU ( 407 calls, 0.000 s avg)
Called by h_psi: add_vuspsi : 0.00s CPU ( 465 calls, 0.000 s avg)
General routines calbec : 0.00s CPU ( 523 calls, 0.000 s avg) cft3s : 0.25s CPU ( 7254 calls, 0.000 s avg) interpolate : 0.00s CPU ( 10 calls, 0.000 s avg) davcio : 0.00s CPU ( 522 calls, 0.000 s avg)
Parallel routines

about.label: Data
about.description: Forces, stress

about.label: Input file for pw.x (SCF calculation)
about.description: contents of input file used for the self-consistent field calculations

string.current:
&control prefix='qe' title='Silicon band structure' pseudo_dir='/apps/dftqe/r113/data/atoms_lda' outdir='/var/ion/data/sessions/2818634/dftqe587' tstress = .true., tprnfor = .true.,
/ &system ibrav= 2,celldm(1)= 10.2612121203,nat= 2, ntyp= 1,ecutwfc= 16.0,ecutrho= 96.0,nbnd=8,occupations='tetrahedra', degauss=0,
/ &electrons electron_maxstep= , conv_thr=1E-6,
/ ATOMIC_SPECIES Si 28.086 Si.UPF ATOMIC_POSITIONS crystal Si 0.0 0.0 0.0 Si 0.25 0.25 0.25 K_POINTS automatic 8 8 8 0 0 0

about.label: Input file for dos.x (DOS calculation)
about.description: contents of input file used for the DoS calculations

about.label: Input file for pw.x (non-SCF calculation)
about.description: contents of input file used for the non self-consistent field calculations

string.current:
&control prefix='qe' title='Silicon band structure' pseudo_dir='/apps/dftqe/r113/data/atoms_lda' outdir='/var/ion/data/sessions/2818634/dftqe587' tstress = .true., tprnfor = .true., calculation='bands'
/ &system ibrav= 2,celldm(1)= 10.2612121203,nat= 2, ntyp= 1,ecutwfc= 16.0,ecutrho= 96.0,nbnd=8,occupations='tetrahedra', degauss=0,
/ &electrons electron_maxstep= , conv_thr=1E-6,
/ ATOMIC_SPECIES Si 28.086 Si.UPF ATOMIC_POSITIONS crystal Si 0.0 0.0 0.0 Si 0.25 0.25 0.25 K_POINTS tpiba_b 3 0.5 0.5 0.5 5.0 0.0 0.0 0.0 5.0 1.0 0.0 0.0 5.0

about.label: Input file for bands.x (band structure calculation)
about.description: contents of input file used for the band structure calculations

about.label: Input file for plotband.x (band structure visualization)
about.description: contents of input file used for the band structure visualization
